messages.content:
Describe the potential impact of this vulnerability on the affected systems.

The Chaty WordPress plugin before 2.8.3 and Chaty Pro WordPress plugin before 2.8.2 do not sanitise and escape the search parameter before outputting it back in the admin dashboard, leading to a Reflected Cross-Site Scripting

This Reflected XSS vulnerability can lead to unauthorized execution of scripts in the context of an administrator's session. Attackers could potentially steal session cookies, perform actions on behalf of the administrator, or deface the website, thereby affecting the confidentiality, integrity, and availability (CIA) of the system.
